title: thelymitra basaltica
intro: Thelymitra basaltica, also known as the basalt sun orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Thelymitra basaltica is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, due to its bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of extracts or tinctures, which are applied topically to the affected area or taken internally under medical supervision.
